author: codex-agent

patch.value: Align default item types with Decision tracking guidance

Current runtime create/type contracts include Chore,Epic,Event,Feature,Issue,Meeting,Milestone,Reminder,Task but exclude Decision, while repository operating guidance explicitly expects decision artifacts. This mismatch creates first-run governance friction for agent workflows.
Default type guidance is consistent: either include Decision in the default runtime type registry/contracts or update bootstrap guidance to auto-provision Decision with clear examples.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm context --limit 10; pm search 'Decision item type missing' --limit 10; pm search 'built-in Decision item type' --limit 10; pm list-open --limit 20; pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Net-new because no open item currently tracks alignment between default type registry/contracts and decision-tracking guidance.

message: Track Decision type guidance alignment from comprehensive audit

value.note: Repository operating guidance requires decision artifacts
Runtime default type registry lacks Decision in current contract output

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Governance evidence: contracts output for create runtime_schema types currently lists Chore,Epic,Event,Feature,Issue,Meeting,Milestone,Reminder,Task with no Decision type, while repository operating guidance expects decision artifacts. Aligning defaults or bootstrap guidance avoids first-run mismatch for agent workflows.
